MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-14-2014 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Moton To Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Nov-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Attorney Jessica Alexandra for Plaintiff Harold Lawrence Von Muuller the moving party/ Attorney Brenda Cruz Keith for Defendant Mark Gin the opposing party.

Argument is held regarding PLAINTIFF HAROLD VON MULLER's Notice Of Motion And Moton To Claim Of Exemption. This matter has been taken under submission. The Defendant's Counsel has submitted a proposed oprder. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Moton To Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Nov-06-2013 Continued To Nov-15-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF HAROLD VON MULLER Notice Of Motion And Moton To Claim Of Exemption is continued to November 15, 2013. Moving party is ordered to provide a courtesy copy of the First Amended Complaint no later than November 8, 2013 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Order To Show Cause Re: Defendant Mark Gin And Jenny Kwong'S Contempt Of Court
Off Calendar May-31-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances, Atty. Jessica Alexandra of Alexandra Law Firm (415-350-4658)appearing for plaintiff Harold Lawrence Von Muller.
Atty. Mark Rorem of Law Office of Mark Rorem (415-438-4658) appearing for Defendant Mark Gin, no other appearance.

Matter on calenar for hearing re: Order To Show Cause Re: Defendant Mark Gin And Jenny Kwong'S Contempt Of Court.
Plaintiff's witness Doug Winter was sworn and examined; Plaintiff Harold Lawrence von Muller sworn and examined on his own behalf.

Plaintiff's exhibit 1 - Inspection report of Doug Winter dated 5-12-12 marked for ID

Court having reviewed all pleadings, heard oral argument and evidence rules as follows: Moving party has not met the standard of proof, there being no competent evidence provided. The finding of contempt is denied. The matter is dismissed. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: Karen Liu, CSR: Kebbie Acevedo-Ramirez, 7692 (415-421-3021)
